description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a long-sleeve pullover and jogger-style pants. The figure wears over-ear headphones and has a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle swept upward. Visible accessories include a small plush toy or keychain attached to the waistband and a ring on one hand. The figure's shoes are low-profile and athletic, and there is a tattoo visible on the lower leg. The face is partially obscured by a mask or scarf, adding to the urban, streetwear-inspired look. The overall build and posture suggest a relaxed, confident pedestrian commonly seen in city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male with headphones, a plush accessory, and a distinctive swept-up hairstyle, wearing urban streetwear and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial mask, headphones, plush accessory at the waist, and tattoo on the lower leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the headphones, hairstyle, and the plush accessory hanging from the waistband.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the pullover, jogger pants, and the plush accessory more clearly.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the headphones, hairstyle, and the plush accessory, with the tattoo on the lower leg partially visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual pullover and jogger pants with urban streetwear style, accessorized with headphones and a plush keychain
